common_patterns.overview: Common visual improvement patterns organized by project type. Each pattern describes a typical user request and the safe, visual-only approach to address it.

pattern.name: color_scheme_update
pattern.description: User wants to change colors to match brand guidelines
pattern.approach: Identify the project's color definitions: CSS custom properties on :root, Tailwind theme colors, SCSS variables, or theme configuration files. Change only the color values, not the variable names or structure.

avoid.item: Don't rename variables — other code may reference them by name
Don't add new color variables that require logic changes to use

pattern.name: spacing_and_layout_fix
pattern.description: User wants to fix spacing, alignment, or layout issues
pattern.approach: Adjust CSS properties: margin, padding, gap, grid-template-*, flex properties, width, max-width, and alignment properties. Prefer CSS adjustments over HTML restructuring.

avoid.item: Don't change the number of rendered elements (that's logic)
Don't modify conditional rendering

pattern.name: typography_improvement
pattern.description: User wants better fonts, sizes, or text hierarchy
pattern.approach: Adjust font-family, font-size, font-weight, line-height, letter-spacing, and text-related CSS properties. Use the project's existing typography scale if one exists.

avoid.item: Don't change the actual text content — that's content, not visuals
Don't change text that's generated by JavaScript

pattern.name: animation_and_transition_polish
pattern.description: User wants smoother animations or better transitions
pattern.approach: Modify CSS transition and animation properties: duration, timing-function, delay, keyframes. Add transition properties to elements that lack them.

safe_changes.item: Add CSS transitions to elements that change state visually

avoid.item: Don't change what triggers the animation — that's logic
Don't modify JavaScript animation libraries or their configuration objects (unless purely visual params)

pattern.name: responsive_design_fix
pattern.description: User reports layout breaks at certain screen sizes
pattern.approach: Modify media query breakpoints and responsive CSS properties. Adjust flex-wrap, grid-template-columns within media queries. Test across the reported breakpoints.

safe_changes.item: Modify responsive layout properties within media queries
Add or modify overflow and white-space handling

avoid.item: Don't change component rendering logic for mobile vs desktop
Don't modify responsive JavaScript (useMediaQuery hooks, etc.)

pattern.name: color_and_theme_update
pattern.description: User wants to change application colors or apply a theme
pattern.approach: Modify resource dictionary brush definitions, style setters for Background/Foreground/BorderBrush, and control template visual states.

safe_changes.item: Change SolidColorBrush/GradientBrush Color values in ResourceDictionary
Modify Style Setter properties for visual attributes
Adjust ControlTemplate visual elements and states

avoid.item: Don't modify data triggers' binding paths — only visual property values
Don't change event setters within styles

pattern.name: layout_and_spacing_fix
pattern.description: User wants to fix control positioning or spacing
pattern.approach: Modify layout panel properties: Grid RowDefinitions/ColumnDefinitions, StackPanel Orientation, Margin, Padding, HorizontalAlignment, VerticalAlignment.

safe_changes.item: Adjust Margin and Padding on visual elements
Modify Grid row/column sizes (Star, Auto, fixed)

avoid.item: Don't add or remove rows/columns from Grid if they're referenced by code-behind
Don't change control types (e.g., Button to ToggleButton) — that's behavior

pattern.name: style_cleanup
pattern.description: User wants to clean up inconsistent styling
pattern.approach: Consolidate duplicate StyleSheet definitions, adjust style values for consistency, use theme colors from the project's theme provider.

safe_changes.item: Extract repeated style values into shared style objects (visual consolidation only)

avoid.item: Don't modify component logic or state
Don't change which style is applied conditionally — that's logic

pattern.name: animation_polish
pattern.description: User wants to improve animation feel
pattern.approach: Adjust Animated API configuration: duration, easing, toValue, useNativeDriver. Modify LayoutAnimation configurations.

safe_changes.item: Change Animated.timing() duration and easing parameters

avoid.item: Don't change what triggers the animation (event handlers, state changes)
Don't modify animated value bindings — only animation config

pattern.name: output_colorization
pattern.description: User wants colored or formatted CLI output
pattern.approach: Add or modify chalk (or equivalent) color/style chains on output strings. Adjust log level formatting — prefix colors, symbol styles.

safe_changes.item: Wrap output strings with chalk/style calls: chalk.green(text)

avoid.item: Don't change what's output — only how it's colored
Don't modify the conditions that decide which color to use — that's logic

pattern.name: progress_indicator_polish
pattern.description: User wants better-looking progress bars or spinners
pattern.approach: Modify ora (or equivalent) spinner configuration: spinner style, color, prefix text format. Adjust progress bar format strings and visual width.

safe_changes.item: Change spinner style (ora spinners list), color, and text format
Adjust progress bar format template and visual width
Modify table column widths and border characters

avoid.item: Don't change when spinners start/stop — that's logic
Don't modify progress calculation — only display format
